name: What can go wrong with voice search optimization for lawyers?
description: Common problems are unclear wording, inconsistent local info, slow mobile pages, and content that reads like marketing instead of answers.

mainEntity.name: What can go wrong with voice search optimization for lawyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: The biggest risks are vague content, inconsistent business details, and over-optimized pages that sound unnatural. If your answers are too long or too promotional, voice assistants are less likely to use them.
acceptedAnswer.description: Common problems are unclear wording, inconsistent local info, slow mobile pages, and content that reads like marketing instead of answers.
